thread_tweets.text:
I don’t even have a top 5 tbh right now 

1. What alts are paying me for the risk I’m taking? 

2. Are they outperforming other markets? If not. Why would I buy? 

3. Is there any value accrual to the investors / holders or am I being diluted away? 

Etc etc. when stocks stop giving the returns they are. I’ll reconsider being more aggressive if there’s real signs of life. HTF reclaims etc. but until then. It doesn’t make sense to deploy much here to me.

thread_tweets.text:
I do think it’s a forced narrative. 

Structurally the following doesn’t exist 

1. There is no previous basing or HRF support here 

2. There is no HH + HL

3. It would be a V reversal with no time spent in accumulation and forming a base / range. 

In saying that. I don’t think the upside is worth the risk vs a million other things you could buy. Crypto is very tribal. So if you say anything bad. People get upset bc of said tribalism. Even if the above facts are true. Which they are

yeah the “ai dev boxes” really don’t make a lot of sense right now. i guess it’s possible in the future there will be more good model choices in the 70b-100b range but right now there just aren’t. and those boxes usually have painfully slow ram speeds

you’re way better off getting a high-end consumer gpu. much cheaper and much faster, and 128gb really won’t get you anywhere anyway

tweets.text:
*Humanity's goal for the next century is... prevent WW3.* 

Elon: "Okay, this is going to sound pretty crazy."

"I'd say the economy is 10 times the its current size in 10 years. Greater than. I feel like that's actually a fairly comfortable prediction."

"Obviously if there's like World War III or something.   that that could put a kink in those plans or those expectations. In the absence of World War II, if current trends continue, I would say  the the economy 10xes in 10 years and have a base on the moon."
